meta.title: Portfolio of Yuldashev Faxriddin - Frontend Developer
meta.description: This is the portfolio of Faxriddin Yuldashev. I am a Frontend Developer with a strong passion for building responsive and user-friendly web applications.

hero.hero_title: Frontend developer focused on performance, clean UI &

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.description: My name is Faxriddin Yuldashev, a dedicated Frontend Engineer with a passion for building scalable and high-performance web applications. I specialize in the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem, with deep expertise in Next.js and Feature-Sliced Design architecture. I thrive on solving complex problems and optimizing user experiences. Whether it's developing enterprise-level CRM systems or crafting interactive LMS platforms, I focus on writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code. I am always eager to embrace new challenges and open to opportunities where I can contribute my technical skills to impactful projects.

items.name: Nasiya Savdo
items.description: An installment sales management system with three user roles (Super Admin, Admin, Store). The system helps small businesses efficiently manage debtors, stores, and administrators. It includes role-based authentication, authorization, and full CRUD operations. The project also has an OTP verification flow implemented locally for testing. Although it is a small project, it is fully integrated with a backend.

items.name: Gipermart
items.description: An online retail platform offering household appliances, electronics, home goods, and other products. The website gives users a convenient interface, detailed product information, and a smooth shopping experience. A frontend-only demo authentication is implemented with localStorage to simulate login, logout, and user sessions.

items.name: IT HOUSE ONLINE COURSES
items.description: The main features of the platform include a course catalog, single course pages, video player integration, an interactive test module, and a personal user account. The project is currently in the testing phase, and some features are still being refined.

items.name: INFODESK - ERP & LMS ECOSYSTEM
items.description: A comprehensive management and learning platform designed for educational centers. Its key features include role-based dashboards for CEO, Admin, Operator, Teacher, and Student, an advanced CRM integrated with the Instagram API for lead management, real-time chat and notifications, financial analytics, and a gamified LMS with interactive tests, educational reels, and a coin-based market. The project is currently in an early development stage, and the core features are actively being built.

items.title: Bachelor of Finance and Information Technologies (2nd Year Student)
items.institution: Tashkent International University of Financial Management and Technologies
